None.note: ICDTagNone — every hit can apply (subject to gauge)

verdantDew.note: Team Verdant Dew ticks while a Lunar-Bloom window is open; Nefer / Lauma / Columbina consume for special CAs or skills

globals.durabilityNote: gcsim Durability 25 ≈ 1 gauge unit (1U); 50 ≈ 2U. gaugeUnits = durability / 25.
globals.meltNote: Melt/vape app rate ≈ hitmarks that pass ICD (icdTag+icdGroup) and apply non-zero gauge. Use elementApps + animation hitmarks together.
